MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-08-2018 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-17-2017 Continued To Mar-26-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Stephen H. Cornet, of Law Office of Stephen H. Cornet, APC, Tel. 510.465.6264, for plaintiffs Joseph Gigiallonardo, appearing via CourtCall;
Jesse G. Hutto, of Philip M. Andersen & Associates, Tel. 925.225.6884, for defendants Carolyn Vargas-Phillips, appearing via CourtCall.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. Attorney, Stephen Cornet's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD as to plaintiff JOSEPH DIGIALLONARDO is granted. Counsel must submit a proposed order on judicial council form, that includes upcoming hearing dates and plaintiff's contact information. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2016 Set For Trial On Jul-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
